# renderingState

**Instance Property**

The status of the engine’s audio playback.

## Declaration

```swift
var renderingState: PHASESoundEvent.RenderingState { get }
```

## Discussion

Access this property to check the engine’s playback status. The value reflects the state that you control by calling one of the functions: [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/start()], [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/stop()], or [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/pause()].

## Controlling and Inspecting Playback State

- **pause()**: Pauses all audio playback.
- **start()**: Starts or resumes all audio playback.
- **stop()**: Stops all audio playback.
- **update()**: Processes app commands and increments framework processing.
- **lastRenderTime**
